name: Creatine
summary: Decision-ready summary: Creatine is best framed for strength and power output; lean mass support; cognitive fatigue resistance; safety screen: advanced kidney disease; active renal monitoring concerns.
description: Creatine supports strength; muscle; cognitive fatigue with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: improved working memory and intelligence tasks
claimMap.notes: improved working memory and intelligence tasks

claimMap.claim: Creatine monohydrate may support memory and some attention/processing-speed outcomes in adults, but evidence is domain-specific rather than a broad cognition guarantee.
claimMap.notes: Creatine monohydrate may support memory and some attention/processing-speed outcomes in adults, but evidence is domain-specific rather than a broad cognition guarantee.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Creatine monohydrate; intervention durations varied; dose not standardized in row

sources.title: The effects of creatine supplementation on cognitive function in adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis
sources.citation: Sixteen RCTs; creatine monohydrate; memory evidence moderate certainty; processing speed/attention lower certainty.
